headline: Carnival Reshapes Debt Listings While Elevating Cunard Luxury Experience
summary: Carnival Corporation & plc (NYSE:CCL) plans to voluntarily delist certain senior notes and debentures from the NYSE, the UK FCA official list, and the London Stock Exchange as part of its proposed unification of the dual-listed structure. The company links these capital markets moves to its broader corporate reorganization plans, aiming to simplify how its debt securities trade and are regulated. Separately, Cunard, Carnival's luxury brand, is partnering with celebrity stylist Micaela...
